headline: Garbage Stock GFL Rises on Potential Buyout. Here’s the Math.
summary: The stock has been weak lately, along with shares of other waste haulers, because investors want more AI in their portfolios and less garbage.

headline: Frankfurter Leben lines up offer for Athora’s German unit – report
summary: Apollo Global Management-backed Athora has been weighing the future of its German operation, including a possible disposal, after finding it difficult to expand the business.
